title: Increased build limit
description: allows you to build from y -1024 to 1024
body:
## 🛠️ Increase Build Height

---

### **Description**

This utility modifies the default build height limits in minecraft, dramatically expanding the available build area.

* **Min/Max Range:** The buildable space is set from **-1024** to **1024**.
* **Use Cases:** Ideal for deep subterranean bases, extremely tall aerial structures, and complex, multi-layered environments that exceed ~~standard~~ limits.

---

### **Installation**

Follow these steps for a quick setup:

* [x] Download the latest release for whatever version you use.
* [ ] Verify your game version compatibility
* [x] Just put the downloaded resourepack in your C:\Users\username\AppData\Roaming.minecraft\resourcepacks

You can get to this folder my going in game, settings, resourepacks, and hit open resourepack folder. Just put this folder in and voila this amazing pack will work.
